name: compliant-pool-scripts
description: Off-chain helpers: build the pool/ASP Merkle trees and produce witness inputs for the withdraw circuit. Hashing is delegated to the real compiled Noir circuit (via @noir-lang/noir_wasm + noir_js) rather than re-implemented in JS, so the off-chain tree is always consistent with what the circuit and on-chain Poseidon2 host function compute.
